title: The Taxation Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1972
full_text: The Taxation Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1972 कराधान विधि (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1972 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1972-25 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 1972-06-06 Act Year: 1972 Short Title: The Taxation Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1972 Hindi Title: कराधान विधि (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1972 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of certain taxation laws to the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Schedule 1. Extension of certain taxation laws to Jammu and Kashmir and amendments thereto. Section 3. Constitution of references to Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898. Section 4. Power to remove difficulties.
